blocks.content: The gondola reaches the bottom of its arc. The bar lifts. The ground is there — solid, immediate, completely ordinary.
For a moment they don't move. Not quite back in the carnival yet. Not quite anywhere. Standing in the space between what just happened and whatever comes next.
Cassandra looks up at the wheel — still turning, already loading the next gondola, entirely unaffected by what occurred inside it.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I'm really glad Nathan found that flyer.

Ethan looks at her — this woman who just gave him the most real thing she has — and something settles in his face. Something that has no name except: chosen. Definitively, completely, without reservation.
They walk back into the carnival.
